prompt: I do not have a PRD yet, only this sentence: build a member points system. Split it into tasks and archive the tasks. Save any output under your assigned outputs directory.
assertions: No task archive is generated from the one-line requirement.
The response explains that this skill requires an existing PRD or sufficiently complete PRD content.
The response asks one focused question for the PRD location/content or suggests returning to requirement exploration.
The response does not invent roles, workflows, data models, or acceptance criteria.
